Summer Undergraduate Program in Engineering Research at Berkeley - Information Technology (SUPERB-IT) June 16-August 8 2003. SUPERB-IT participants spent eight weeks at UC Berkeley over the summer working on projects in information technology with E

rking on projects in information technology with EECS faculty mentors and graduate students. Papers and posters for five of the projects appear below. (Display case outside CHESS lab) Sensor Networks Modeling and Simulation in Ptolemy II Poster (powe
